title: Blackstone Fund Prices $400 Million Bond Amid Software Turmoil
description: A publicly-traded private credit fund managed by Blackstone Inc. sold a $400 million bond one day after the fund disclosed continued signs of stress in one of its largest investments.
content: A publicly-traded private credit fund managed by Blackstone Inc. sold a $400 million bond one day after the fund disclosed continued signs of stress in one of its largest investments.
